import React ,{useState}from 'react' import Axios from 'axios'; import { useHistory } from 'react-router'; import { Navbar } from '../Navbar'; function ProfileUpload() { let history = useHistory(); const [fname, setfname] = useState("") const [lname, setlname] = useState("") const [desc, setdesc] = useState("") const [price, setprice] = useState(0) const [categoryvalue, setcategory] = useState(1) const [Deliveryvalue, setDelivery] = useState(1) const [Images, setImages] = useState([]) const [quantity, setquantity] = useState(1) const fnamehandle =(event)=>{ setfname(event.currentTarget.value) } const lnamehandle =(event)=>{ setlname(event.currentTarget.value) } const descchange =(event)=>{ setdesc(event.currentTarget.value) } const pricechange =(event)=>{ setprice(event.currentTarget.value) } const onchangecategory =(event)=>{ setcategory(event.currentTarget.value) } const updateImages =(newImages)=>{ setImages(newImages) } const onchangequantity =(event)=>{ setquantity(event.currentTarget.value) } const onchangeDelivery =(event)=>{ setDelivery(event.currentTarget.value) } const url = `http://localhost:5000/api/profile/addaddress` const onsubmit = (e)=>{ // if(!title ||!desc ||!price || !Images||!categoryvalue ||!quantity ||!Delivery){ // return alert('fill all the fields') // } const variables = { title: title, description: desc, price:price , image: Images, category: categoryvalue, countInStock: quantity, delivery:Deliveryvalue, } e.preventDefault() Axios.post(url,variables) .then(response=>{ if(response.data.success){ alert('Product Uploaded Successfully') history.push('/category') } else{ alert("Failed to Upload Product") } }) } return (

New address

) } export default ProfileUpload
